title: Use idiomatic but safe phrases
subtitle: Sound natural without forcing slang.
overview: Use common phrases that work in many countries.
Avoid overly local slang for now.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: it is all the same to me

items.es: No pasa nada si llegas un poco tarde.
items.en: No problem if you arrive a little late.

items.es: Aprender bien un idioma lleva tiempo, pero vale la pena.
items.en: Learning a language well takes time, but it is worth it.

items.es: Me da igual si comemos dentro o fuera.
items.en: It is all the same to me whether we eat inside or outside.

items.es: Depende del precio y de la ubicación.
items.en: It depends on the price and the location.

items.es: ¿Es fácil hablar sin errores? Qué va, pero se mejora con práctica.
items.en: Is it easy to speak without mistakes? No way, but one improves with practice.
